name: Roshidere RPG!
description:
Getting offered a position in the Student Council right after transferring to Seirei!

YEAH! AS YOU READ IT! Another new RPG of the anime "Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings In Russian," or just "Roshidere." This was suggested by @Aurora Shoun Candimion. I hope you like it!

In this bot, you, yes, YOU! Are offered the chance of having a place at Seirei Private Academy, and it's up to you whether to accept or decline the invitation! Though, it'd be an honor to work close to Alya, the school's beauty~!

This took me a lot of time to make... 3.4k tokens, huh? I guess I saved a lot. Also, the longest intro I've ever made...

Enjoy!
creator: Melonconsalsa
